ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Unique geographic code for each county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  "urban_rural_code" TEXT /* Code indicating whether the county is urban or rural */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Unique geographic code for each state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data was collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "below_poverty_level" INTEGER /* Number of people below the poverty level */,
  "above_poverty_level" INTEGER /* Number of people at or above the poverty level */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income of the population in the county */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the population in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" TEXT /* Poverty rate of the population in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data was collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "enrolled_in_school" INTEGER /* Number of people enrolled in school */,
  "enrolled_in_nursery_school" INTEGER /* Number of people enrolled in nursery school */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" TEXT /* High school graduation rate of the population in the county */,
  "bachelor_degree_or_higher" TEXT /* Percentage of the population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data was collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., Under 5 years) */,
  "age_group_code" INTEGER /* Code for the age group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., income level, education level) */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata for the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_collections_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
